data.title: Poo~Pourri reveals first-ever Scent of the Year, offering two premium scents for a fresh start in 2026.
data.description: Today, in Dallas, on January 26, 2026, a new line of high-end fragrances has been introduced to assist in moving on from the chaos of the previous year and embracing a renewed sense of confidence. Dubbed ~Pourri, a creation from the same creators of the popular Poo~Pourri bathroom spray, these scents aim to encapsulate rejuvenation and positivity. The announcement details the launch of these scents and showcases the brand's commitment to bringing innovation to the market.

data.title: Aligned Automation sponsors professional golfers Cole Sherwood, Dillon Stewart, and Kaleiya Romero. Announcement made on 26-Jan-2026.
data.description: Aligned Automation has revealed their sponsorship of professional golfers Cole Sherwood, Dillon Stewart, and Kaleiya Romero in a recent announcement. The partnership was officially announced on 26-Jan-2026. The company has made adjustments to the original news release, indicating their support for these athletes.

data.title: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) declares $0.12 quarterly cash dividend, payable on March 13, 2026 to shareholders of record on Feb 13.
data.description: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) from North Reading, Mass., disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share. The dividend will be paid out on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. Specializing in automated test equipment and advanced robotics systems, Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) helps customers meet quality standards in semiconductor and electronics production.

data.title: Celebrities and winners gather at 10th Pegasus World Cup; $3M to Skippylongstocking, $1M to Test Score, $500k to Destino D'Oro.
data.description: Empire of The Sun and Two Friends delivered headline performances at Skippylongstocking's victory at the $3 million Pegasus World Cup Invitational. Test Score also triumphed, winning the $1 million Pegasus World Cup Turf Invitational, while Destino D'Oro took home $500,000 in the Pegasus World Cup Filly & Mare Turf Invitational. The event witnessed record-breaking moments throughout.

data.title: Catalyze secures 100 MW solar tax equity financing with RBC for 18 community and C&I projects across NY, IL, CA & VA.
data.description: In Houston, Catalyze has successfully secured 100 megawatts of solar tax equity with RBC. This funding will support 18 projects in community and commercial/industrial sectors across New York, Illinois, California, and Virginia. The projects are expected to be completed between 2026 and 2027.

data.title: DOGE, SHIB rally 3% but remain below major moving averages after 60% crashes from 2024 peaks. DOGE: Dead Cat Bounce or Real Reversal? Trading below EMAs: 20: $0.13040, 50: $0.13728, 100: $0.15236, 200: $0.17296. DOGE oversold at $0.11616.
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB) saw a 3% increase in value on Monday but are still below key moving averages following a significant 60% drop from their peak values in 2024. Dogecoin specifically has experienced a downturn, with current levels showing a 60% decrease from its peak around $0.30-$0.32 in September 2025. The price of DOGE is currently lower than all major EMAs, indicating a bearish trend: 20 EMA stands at $0.13040, 50 EMA at $0.13728, 100 EMA at $0.15236, and 200 EMA at $0.17296. The asset is also close to the lower Bollinger Band at $0.11616, potentially signaling oversold conditions in the short term. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GitHub Copilot CLI enhances AI capabilities for terminal tasks with new features since its September 2025 launch. Now compatible with Windows, Mac, and Linux.
data.description: Since its launch in September 2025, the GitHub Copilot CLI has been updated to include headless automation, custom agents, and integration with MCP servers. The tool is now accessible on Windows, Mac, and Linux operating systems.

data.title: NanoFuse outperforms DBM and bioactive glass, validated by a study in the Int. Journal of Spine Surgery. Significant implications for spinal fusion.
data.description: A recent study published in the International Journal of Spine Surgery has provided robust scientific support for NanoFuse as an advanced synthetic biologic for bone regeneration, particularly in the context of spinal fusion. This research, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida and conducted on (specific number) patients, underscores the promising potential of NanoFuse in enhancing bone healing processes. The findings highlight the efficacy of NanoFuse and suggest its possible future significance in spinal fusion procedures.

data.title: ViaPath Foundation offers 2026 Impact Grant to aid at-risk communities nationwide. Applications open for US nonprofits.
data.description: Today, the ViaPath Foundation revealed the introduction of the 2026 Impact Grant, open for applications from non-profit organizations nationwide. The grant aims to support organizations dedicated to empowering at-risk communities. This initiative is part of the foundation's ongoing efforts to make a positive impact in the United States.

data.title: Kyndryl (NYSE: KD) will release Q3 2026 results on Feb. 9, 2026, for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Kyndryl, a prominent provider of vital enterprise technology services, revealed that it is scheduled to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of its 2026 fiscal year, covering the period ending on December 31, 2025. The report is set to be released on Monday, February 9, 2026. Kyndryl is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol KD.

data.title: Northern Illinois Food Bank plans five 2026 events to aid hunger relief in 13 counties, raising funds and awareness.
data.description: The Northern Illinois Food Bank has revealed a series of five key fundraising events set to occur in 2026, with proceeds aiding hunger relief across 13 counties. These events play a crucial role in raising funds and awareness for the cause.

data.title: LightIC Technologies and indie partner to deliver cost-efficient FMCW LiDAR for automotive, robotic industries.
data.description: A strategic partnership between LightIC Technologies and indie has been announced in San Jose, California. LightIC, a top supplier of silicon photonics-based FMCW LiDAR, has integrated indie's iND83301 SoC into their architecture. This integration replaces FPGA-based processing and marks the completion of the reference design. The partnership aims to enhance automotive solutions through this collaboration. This development signifies a significant milestone, leveraging indie’s SoC technology in LightIC’s LiDAR architecture. Both companies are optimistic about the future prospects of this partnership.
